name: 鲍伊猎刀（★） | 渐变之色
nameZh: 鲍伊猎刀（★） | 渐变之色
descriptionEn: This full-tang sawback Bowie knife is designed for heavy use in brutal survival situations. It has been painted by airbrushing transparent paints that fade together over a chrome base coat. This isn't just a weapon, it's a conversation piece - Imogen, Arms Dealer In Training
descriptionZh: 这把全龙骨锯齿的鲍伊猎刀是专为在残酷的生存环境中大量使用而设计的。 这把武器以铬为外表，使用喷笔涂上了相互渐变的透明涂装。 这不仅仅是一把武器，更是一种潮流 - 实习军火商伊莫金
